context.current_marketing_model: Human-led demand gen with SDR outbound, quarterly content campaigns, and paid LinkedIn ads managed by an external agency
context.target_audience: VP Sales and RevOps leaders at mid-market SaaS companies (200-2000 employees)
constraints: Cannot replace SDR team in next 6 months
Must maintain SOC 2 compliant data handling
goals: Become discoverable by procurement agents in the agent economy
Enable autonomous A/B testing of positioning
